manifest.name: KiloCode

name: KiloCode

releases.author: realhenrylan
releases.description:
## KiloCode for Obsidian v0.1.0

### ✨ Features
- 🤖 AI Chat Sidebar with streaming responses
- 💬 Multi-tab chat with conversation history
- 📝 Inline Edit with diff preview
- 🔧 Slash Commands (`/compact`, `/clear`, `/model`, `/mode`)
- 📎 @mention system for vault files, MCP servers, and subagents
- 📋 Plan Mode (`Shift+Tab` toggle)
- 🌐 MCP Server support
- 🌍 i18n (English & Chinese)
- ⚡ Virtual scrolling for performance

### 📦 Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release
2. Create folder `YourVault/.obsidian/plugins/kilocode/`
3. Copy the files into the folder
4. Enable the plugin in Obsidian Settings → Community plugins

### 📋 Prerequisites
- Obsidian v1.7.2+ (Desktop only)
- KiloCode CLI: `npm install -g @kilocode/cli`
releases.name: v0.1.0 - Initial Release
